title: Cryptool joins Next Block Expo Berlin as a community partner
content_html:
Cryptool is going to Next Block Expo as an official community partner.

The event, billed as the Blockchain Festival of Europe, runs in Berlin on 4 and 5 December 2023. The Cryptool team will be on site to meet investors, founders and ecosystem partners, and to share what the platform will look like ahead of its public launch.

For anyone in the European Web3 scene planning to attend, this is a good moment to come and say hello. NBX is also the start of a longer relationship with the event: Cryptool returns to the same stage as a pitch finalist in 2025.
author: Cryptool
